\subheader{SUMMARY}{Customer-focused Senior Data Scientist with 10 years of experience using experimentation, causal inference, predictive modelling, and recommendation systems to improve discovery, engagement, retention, and monetization in digital products. Strong record of partnering with product, design, engineering, and executive stakeholders to define success metrics, build scalable analytics and ML workflows, and translate complex results into decisions. Hands-on with Python, R, SQL, AWS, dbt, Airflow, Prefect, and more.
}

\section{Kano Apps - Casual Games \hfill
  \includegraphics[height=1em]{icons/logos/kano_logo.png}}
{\vspace{-0.2cm}}


\begin{entrylist}
\entry
  {2025-05 -- \\ 2026-02}
  {Senior Game Data Engineer \& BI Analyst}
  {Victoria, BC Canada}
  {Brought in to rebuild Kano's analytics platform and restore data science capability, including migrating anomaly detection and inherited ML assets to a modern Python, DBT, and AWS stack. \textbf{Responsibilities \& Achievements}:
  \begin{itemize}

    \item Migrated the analytical-event anomaly detection framework off R into Python, and extended coverage to irregular-cadence events that the prior framework dropped, by folding their known cadence into the standard error calculation so they alert against the right baseline.


    \item Reduced daily report refresh times from up to 14 hours to less than 1 hour while lowering EC2 and Athena costs by migrating expensive R ETLs into optimized DBT-Athena SQL models on partitioned Parquet and Iceberg tables.


  \end{itemize}}
\end{entrylist}

\vspace{-1.0cm}
\section{\LARGE Data Science Skillset}
\noindent\rule{\textwidth}{0.4pt}
\vspace{-0.2cm}
~

\textbf{\large Experimentation \& Measurement}
\faGem Designed and evaluated experiments in live digital ecosystems where network effects, feature overlap, and behavioral spillovers complicated clean inference.

~


\textbf{\large Personalization \& Recommendation}
\faGem Built ranking, targeting, and RecSys approaches for content, offers, and social experiences to improve engagement, conversion, and retention.

~


\textbf{\large Predictive Modeling}
\faGem Developed churn, spend conversion, reacquisition, and long-term revenue forecasting models used to guide product, portfolio, and acquisition decisions.

~


\textbf{\large Causal Inference}
\faGem Applied propensity score methods, regression modelling, interaction effects, and quasi-experimental reasoning to estimate incremental product impact.

~


\textbf{\large Model Evaluation \& Governance}
\faGem Diagnosed when a Limited Time Offer rec engine's short-term lift masked longer-term cannibalization, leading to its retirement.




\section{\LARGE Programming}
\noindent\rule{\textwidth}{0.4pt}
R, {\color{red} $\varheartsuit$} Python, SQL, Bash, Ruby


\end{aside}




\section{Kixeye Inc - Mobile Games \hfill
  \includegraphics[height=1em]{icons/logos/kixeye_horse_logo.png}}
{\vspace{-0.2cm}}


\begin{entrylist}
\entry
  {2022-02 -- \\ 2025-01}
  {Lead Data Analyst, Core Analytics Team Lead}
  {Victoria, BC Canada}
  {Led DS and analytics delivery for Kixeye's Core Analytics Team, owning forecasting models, churn diagnosis, and recommendation system improvements across the live mobile games portfolio. \textbf{Responsibilities \& Achievements}:
  \begin{itemize}

    \item Developed a long-term revenue forecasting model in R and Python for game acquisition assessment; identified and corrected a \$14M overestimation, demonstrating the value of rigorous model evaluation in strategic contexts.


    \item Applied behavioral clustering and churn modeling to diagnose a platform matching failure causing abnormal attrition; guided a hybrid recommendation redesign that improved retention and engagement metrics in the affected player segments.


  \end{itemize}}
\end{entrylist}

{\vspace{-0.5cm}}

\begin{entrylist}
\entry
  {2021-01 -- \\ 2022-02}
  {Senior Product Analyst, Acting Core Analytics Team Lead}
  {Victoria, BC Canada}
  {Acting Team Lead while building and deploying DS work — churn models, Alliance RecSys, A/B automation, and content cadence modelling — across Kixeye's live mobile games portfolio. \textbf{Responsibilities \& Achievements}:
  \begin{itemize}

    \item Used multi-stage conversion funnel models and time-series spend dynamics to guide the Design team toward a new content cadence strategy, resulting in more consistent monetization and reduced performance volatility across releases.


    \item Automated KPI forecasting and A/B test reporting ETLs for Product and Design teams, improving experimentation support and freeing substantial analyst time.


    \item Increased churn prediction accuracy from AUC 0.71 to 0.86 in Python, helping identify and remediate multiple gameplay-related churn drivers.


    \item Built an Alliance Recommendation Engine in Python that ranked social groups by predicted uplift in engagement and spend conversion, materially improving retention and increasing yearly revenue by 7\% in concert with other improvements.


  \end{itemize}}
\end{entrylist}

{\vspace{-0.5cm}}

\begin{entrylist}
\entry
  {2019-08 -- \\ 2021-01}
  {Product Analyst, War Commander: Rogue Assault Team}
  {Vancouver, BC Canada}
  {Embedded data scientist on the War Commander live ops team — owning LTV forecasting, spend conversion experimentation, and churn modelling while migrating ML infrastructure off Domino onto Jenkins. \textbf{Responsibilities \& Achievements}:
  \begin{itemize}

    \item Managed experimentation and ML tooling in Python that improved spend conversion by 0.6 percentage points while reducing operating cost.


  \end{itemize}}
\end{entrylist}

\section{Electronic Arts - AAA Games \hfill
  \includegraphics[height=1em]{icons/logos/ea_sports.png}}
{\vspace{-0.2cm}}


\begin{entrylist}
\entry
  {2018-11 -- \\ 2019-07}
  {Data Scientist, Dynamic Experiences Team}
  {Burnaby, BC Canada}
  {Helped establish EA Sports' embedded Data Science function, building A/B experimentation systems, MAB recommendation engines, and predictive models that delivered personalized player experiences in live games. \textbf{Responsibilities \& Achievements}:
  \begin{itemize}

    \item Proposed, designed, and evaluated A/B test messaging campaigns aimed at delivering more personalized in-game experiences using R, SQL, and HiveQL.


    \item Identified player segments most likely to respond positively to upsell messaging, contributing to a 3\% cohort spend increase.


    \item Analysis and recommendations from in-game messaging experiments generated an additional \$2M in revenue for FIFA 19.


    \item Built multi-armed bandit messaging recommendation engines in Ruby for FIFA 20 personalization use cases.


  \end{itemize}}
\end{entrylist}

{\vspace{-0.5cm}}

\begin{entrylist}
\entry
  {2016-06 -- \\ 2018-11}
  {Business Analyst, FIFA Player Analytics Team}
  {Burnaby, BC Canada}
  {Delivered quantitative analysis for FIFA Player Analytics — including propensity score matching for companion app valuation and statistical models for licensing — while managing monthly executive reporting for EA Sports. \textbf{Responsibilities \& Achievements}:
  \begin{itemize}

    \item Used propensity score matching on player cohorts in R to estimate the causal incremental value of FIFA's Companion App and Web App; results demonstrated significant lift in spending behavior and directly influenced platform investment decisions.

    \begin{itemize}

      \item Incremental spending gains among spenders of 4.2\% for Web App users and 7.0\% for Mobile App users, leading to millions in incremental revenue.

      \item Presented findings at EA's 2018 Analyticon conference.

    \end{itemize}


  \end{itemize}}
\end{entrylist}

  \includegraphics[height=1em]{icons/logos/pretio-interactive.png}}
{\vspace{-0.2cm}}


\begin{entrylist}
\entry
  {2015-07 -- \\ 2016-02}
  {Data Scientist}
  {Victoria, BC Canada}
  {Built probabilistic conversion models and drove adoption of Thompson Sampling over Epsilon Greedy for a reward-based ad-serving platform, improving identification of top-performing campaigns. \textbf{Responsibilities \& Achievements}:
  \begin{itemize}

    \item Successfully persuaded engineering team to adopt Thompson Sampling over the original Epsilon Greedy approach, enabling faster and more efficient identification of top-performing advertisements.


    \item Developed a probability model in R for predicting conversion probability on adverts to better assess segmentation opportunities and simulate algorithmic changes.


  \end{itemize}}
\end{entrylist}

  {2014-11 -- \\ 2015-07}
  {Data Analyst, TinyRealms}
  {Victoria, BC Canada}
  {First industry role — applied churn analysis, player segmentation, and game economy diagnosis to identify retention and monetization root causes in a live F2P mobile game. \textbf{Responsibilities \& Achievements}:
  \begin{itemize}

    \item Discovered a segment of players with elevated churn likelihood, attributed it to unbalanced gameplay, and worked with game design on solutions that improved early game (D7) retention from 11.3\% to 14.2\% for the affected cohort.


    \item Discovered that one game-mode cannibalized revenue by reducing the impact of the game's soft paywall, leading to design changes that remedied it.


  \end{itemize}}
\end{entrylist}
